release_notes:
🚀 Major Architecture Update (1.2.9)

- ☁️ Cloud Streak Sync: Securely sync your daily progress and streaks across all your devices using Google Sign-In.
- 🚀 Zero-Jank Engine: Swiping through Azkar is now buttery smooth at 60FPS even on older devices.
- 🔔 Notification Defcon: Upgraded background services to guarantee Azkar and Adhan reminders trigger reliably.
- ✨ Global Smoothness: Added fade transitions to all screens to eliminate heavy animation drops.
